stories.headline: Transforming the Electrical Grid to Power AI
stories.summary: AI’s rapid growth is pushing global energy demand skyward, forcing electrical grids to expand and modernize. Now, companies from China to Nigeria are investing in new tech to power the future. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: First Ghanaians set to be repatriated from South Africa over anti-immigrant protests

stories.headline: HDFC Bank Denies Allegations as Governance Scrutiny Deepens

They are shooting us, the guards and the wardens,” a prisoner said in a video

stories.headline: China Traders Hit Exit After Offshore Trading Curbs
stories.summary: Chinese investors are rushing to find alternative ways to buy and sell overseas equities after Beijing launched its most forceful crackdown on illicit cross-border stock trading to stem capital outflows.

stories.headline: Bolivian minister's convoy ambushed while overseeing roadblock clearance

stories.headline: China mine death toll at least 82 after gas blast
